summary: The diff correctly addresses REQ-20 by refactoring App.tsx to wrap all CartContext-consuming components inside a CartProvider via an inner AppContent component. The fix ensures CartProvider wraps CartIcon, CartPanel, CheckoutModal, and all page sections without touching immutable files. The CartContext file is described as providing a fallback and all cart features are preserved.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a fallback default context value so the app does not crash if context is accessed before the provider mounts.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows App.tsx was refactored to use CartProvider wrapping, but there is no direct evidence in the diff that CartContext.tsx was modified to include a fallback default context value. The file summary for CartContext.tsx does not mention a default value being added.
